overview.description: High-end engineering and R&D company specializing in computer vision, AI engineering and image data processing solutions.
overview.description_long: DataVision is a Prague-based high-end engineering and R&D company specializing in computer vision, image data processing and AI-driven solutions. The team designs and builds complex machine vision systems, develops custom AI models, manages large-scale visual data pipelines and delivers end-to-end automation for industrial, automotive, medical and enterprise applications. Founded in 2004, DataVision has 20+ years of experience helping global companies — including Stryker, Pirelli and Bank Creditas — unlock the full potential of image and video data.

history.origin_story: Founded on May 6, 2004 in Prague by Jindřich Hašek. Has grown over 20+ years into a specialist computer vision and AI engineering firm serving global clients across industrial, automotive, and medical sectors.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by Jindřich Hašek
Reported operations with 20-24 employees and 20+ years of experience

metadata.notes: No CNAIP URL available. Founded May 6, 2004 per EMIS. Legal name Datavision S.R.O., registered at Slinkova 589/2, 15300 Prague. Employee count 20-24 per EMIS (2026). Founder Jindřich Hašek confirmed via LinkedIn search snippet. Clients (Stryker, Pirelli, Bank Creditas) from LinkedIn company description. EMIS reports 25.2% net sales revenue drop in 2024 and 11.02% decrease in total assets. Glassdoor page EI_IE3264760 found in search but not confirmed as Czech DataVision (may be US homonym). Careers page exists but Wix-based site renders via JS so open roles could not be extracted.
